rationale: The citing paper mentions Telpaz et al. (2015) once in the metric-review section to support a general claim that theta-band EEG has been linked to consumer choice prediction. This serves as background context for why theta is one of several EEG metrics examined, together with many other references. The citing study does not directly reuse Telpaz et al.'s experimental design, modeling framework, or specific mechanism in its core analyses or contribution claims.
